Launching skyward from cathedral spire, wings snapping wide, shadow trail spiraling behind her silhouette
Deflecting holy bolt with outstretched palm, dark flame wreathing fingers, arm braced against impact
Landing hard on rooftop, one knee down, wings folded tight, eyes scanning distant threats
Summoning shadow tendrils from cobblestones, arms raised high, hair whipping upward in supernatural wind
Perched on gargoyle's back, wings half-spread for balance, watching city through narrowed amber eyes
Catching falling blade mid-air, clawed fingers closing around steel, ignoring the cutting edge
Walking through blazing inferno, silhouette sharp against flames, coat trailing through untouched fire
Tearing open violet portal with both hands, reality splitting, arcane light spilling across features
Crouching on rooftop edge, one wing extended for balance, rain streaming off leather membrane
Tracing ancient text with claw, candlelight flickering, wings folded close around shadowed reading space
Diving through stained glass window, shards exploding outward, wings tucked for aerodynamic entry
Blocking sword strike overhead, both arms crossed, shadow sparks erupting from defensive barrier
Sprinting across rooftops, wings partially extended, leaping gap between Victorian buildings mid-stride
Slamming fist into stone wall, dark energy radiating outward, cracks spider-webbing from impact point
Vaulting over iron fence, one hand on railing, wings spread wide, boots clearing spikes
Channeling shadow bolt from fingertips, arm extended forward, energy crackling toward distant target
Rolling beneath swinging blade, wings tight against spine, coming up into defensive crouch
Ascending spiral staircase rapidly, wings brushing stone walls, taking steps three at a time
Extinguishing torch with shadow-wreathed hand, darkness spreading from palm, fingers splayed wide over flame
Kicking down heavy oak door, boot extended, splinters flying, wings flared for momentum
Grabbing enemy by collar mid-lunge, lifting off ground, wings beating once for leverage
Dropping from bell tower, wings folded completely, plummeting headfirst toward cobblestone plaza below
Spinning away from crossbow bolt, wings extended asymmetrically, projectile passing through shadow afterimage
Clawing through mystical ward, fingers glowing violet, barrier shattering into crystalline fragments around her
Backflipping off rooftop ledge, wings tucked, hair streaming, boot-tips clearing stone by inches
Throwing shadow dagger overhand, arm snapped forward, dark blade materializing from summoning gesture
Sliding under closing portcullis, wings scraped flat against back, arm reaching for far side
Catching thrown spear single-handed, palm stopping shaft, dark energy absorbing impact force completely
Climbing cathedral exterior, claws finding handholds, wings folded, scaling toward peaked roof rapidly
Shielding face with crossed forearms, shadow barrier forming, blast wave breaking around defensive stance
Swinging from gargoyle outcrop, one hand gripping stone, body arcing toward lower balcony
Incinerating scroll with dark fire, parchment curling, flames spreading from fingertips across ancient writing
Lunging forward with clawed strike, wings flared for speed, talons extended toward vulnerable throat
Twisting mid-air to avoid lightning strike, wings banking hard, electricity passing inches from wing-membrane
Hammering both fists downward into rooftop, shadow shockwave expanding outward, tiles erupting upward
Springing backward off wall, boots leaving scorch marks, wings opening to arrest momentum
Snatching arrow from air beside face, fingers blurred with speed, shaft caught centimeters from cheek
Dragging claws across stone floor, shadow trail following, carving glowing runes into ancient granite
Shouldering through crowd of demons, wings half-spread, shoving bodies aside with brutal efficiency
Raising both hands skyward, summoning storm clouds, shadow lightning crackling between extended fingers
Ducking under horizontal blade swing, spine bent backward, wing-tips scraping ceiling, hair brushing floor
Crushing cultist's amulet in clenched fist, dark energy exploding outward, shards cutting through glove
Leaping between chandelier and balcony, one hand swinging, wings compensating, boots aimed at landing
Ripping ceremonial tapestry from wall, both hands gripping fabric, wings braced, tearing downward violently
Parrying dagger thrust with forearm, shadow armor manifesting, blade glancing off supernatural defense
Surging upward through trapdoor, wings pushing, shoulders breaking rotten wood, emerging into moonlight above
Snapping fingers to ignite ring of candles, dark flame spreading, circle illuminating from single gesture
Hooking ankle around opponent's leg mid-combat, wings beating for torque, throwing enemy off-balance
Pressing palm against locked chest, shadow seeping into mechanism, ancient lock corroding instantly open
Cartwheeling sideways over pew, one wing extended, dodging thrown holy water, landing in combat stance
